value.description: Some ES-like fluff description for power

rulesStrings.li: questDescription(askerIsNull==true)->A powerful mage wants to perform some environmental experiments. However, if she carries out her experiment, [gameConditionDescriptionFuture].\n\nShe is concerned about getting in trouble with the council of mages, and is asking for your consent.

questDescription(asker_factionLeader==True)->A vengeful Daedra is threatening the [asker_faction_pawnsPlural] of [asker_faction_name]. [asker_faction_leaderTitle] [asker_nameFull] wants you to send a message to the dark spirit accepting responsibility for their transgressions.\n\nIf you do, the Daedra will turn its anger on you. [gameConditionDescriptionFuture].

questDescription(asker_royalInCurrentFaction==True)->[asker_nameFull], a [asker_royalTitleInCurrentFaction] of [asker_faction_name], wants to test a destructive, experimental sorcery spell. If [asker_pronoun] does, [gameConditionDescriptionFuture].\n\nSince you are a local landholder under imperial law, [asker_nameDef] needs your honorable permission to proceed.

value.descriptionFuture: a weather-control spell will force the weather around [map_definite] to be [forcedWeather_indefinite] for [gameConditionDuration_duration]
